summary: PR-review fixes: EvidenceSet carries an explicit SeedMetricsPresent flag so LowCompetition refuses with the seed-evidence reason when EverBee omits searched_keyword; FetchProducts unwraps *client.APIError so real 402/429 statuses classify as plan caps; runtime version var kept in root.go at the base-stamped value per the library's release-ledger guard.
reason: Greptile P1s on PR #1506 (suggestions-only responses produced a misleading low-competition refusal reason; product-path plan caps relied on body-text matching) plus the verify-release-ledger guard, which forbids moving or restamping var version lines in a publish PR.
validated_outcome: go build/vet/test ./... pass; TestLowCompetition gained a missing-seed-metrics regression case.
